text.title: Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: quarter pattern wrong; horizon not in enum; rationale empty; allocation drifts > ±5pp from 70/20/10; kill triggers empty; H2/H3 missing.

list.item: allocation drift > 5pp from 70/20/10 without explicit rebalance memo justifying.
products with untagged horizon (must default to H1 explicitly).
kill_triggers missing any of {H1, H2, H3} keys.
rationale shorter than 10 chars (no real reasoning).
rebalance_memo_link missing when allocation differs from previous quarter.
